2 New Project Support to KHAS within the Scope of TUBITAK ARDEB 1001 Program

, who re-submitted revised project proposals by receiving the (

improvable

) score in the 2nd Term of

in 2023, and

Dr. Lecturer Member Tugce Balli

’s projects have earned the right to be supported.

As a result of this latest development, the support rate for projects submitted by our university in the second semester of 2023 was

38.8%.

The project titled “

The Role of Music Videos in Destination Marketing: Analysis of User Interactions on YouTube with Artificial Intelligence-Supported Technologies”

by Prof. Dr. Metin Kozak, Dean of the Faculty of Communication, and the project titled

“Development of Interpretable Feature Selection and Extraction Algorithms for Asynchronous Brain Computer Interface (BCI) Systems”

by Dr. Tuğçe Ballı, faculty member of the Department of Management Information Systems, were supported.

We congratulate our executive and research academics whose projects have been supported and wish them success.
